title: MEG VLCC rates rise || USG Aframax demand declines
section_path: MEG VLCC rates rise || USG Aframax demand declines
section_path_text: MEG VLCC rates rise || USG Aframax demand declines
summary:
Main
This week, in the East, we discuss rising VLCC rates in the Middle East. In the West, we look at cooling Aframax demand in the US Gulf. By Mary Melton
Image reference: Screenshot 2024-02-15 13.08.12.png | assets/2024-02-15_meg-vlcc-rates-rise-usg-aframax-demand-declines_img_screenshot2024-02-15130812_bcc2b8f44167.png
VLCC freight rates Middle East-to-China ( TD3C ) have increased about 20% in the last two weeks.
